Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players benefit from the most up-to-date features and fixes in games.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Changes how timestamps are displayed in dynamic strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves readability of time-related information for players.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a fast-access string for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the speed of retrieving version information for updates.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are processed in strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Increases the speed of displaying time-related information in the game.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagOCEnableDualHistory_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Activates a dual history tracking system for object changes.
Removed_Other.purpose: Enhances undo/redo capabilities, making it easier for players to manage changes.

Added_Other.mechanism: Corrects issues with capturing data retrieval processes.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother gameplay by fixing data capture problems.
